steps.title: Register voter "ana"
steps.narration: credentialHash = keccak256("govbr:ana") — the chain never sees the underlying CPF.

steps.title: Register voter "bruno"
steps.narration: credentialHash = keccak256("govbr:bruno") — the chain never sees the underlying CPF.

steps.title: Register voter "carla"
steps.narration: credentialHash = keccak256("govbr:carla") — the chain never sees the underlying CPF.

steps.title: Guardrail: double registration
steps.narration: Registering "ana" a second time must be rejected.

steps.title: Open cycle #1
steps.narration: opensAt=1783190853, closesAt=1783191153 (a 5-minute window for this run)

steps.title: Submit proposal — "Reforma da Praça Central do Bairro Kobrasol"
steps.narration: Submitted by ana. Content pinned at ipfs://bafybeigdemoprac1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0jklpraca (BRL 180.000).

steps.title: Submit proposal — "Iluminação de LED na Rua das Palmeiras"
steps.narration: Submitted by bruno. Content pinned at ipfs://bafybeigdemoiluminacao1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0jkl (BRL 95.000).

steps.title: Submit proposal — "Reforma da UBS do Bairro Forquilhinha"
steps.narration: Submitted by carla. Content pinned at ipfs://bafybeigdemoubs1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0jklforquilha (BRL 260.000).

steps.title: Guardrail: unregistered submitter
steps.narration: An address with no VoterRegistry entry must not be able to submit a proposal.

steps.title: Vote — ana votes for the UBS renovation
Vote — bruno votes for the UBS renovation
Vote — carla votes for the praça
Guardrail: double voting
steps.narration: ana already voted this cycle; a second vote from the same address must revert.

steps.title: Guardrail: unregistered voter
steps.narration: An address with no registry entry must not be able to cast a vote.

steps.title: Guardrail: early close
steps.narration: Closing before closesAt must be rejected — there is no way to cut a cycle short.

steps.title: Close cycle #1
steps.narration: Anyone can call this once closesAt has elapsed; the contract computes the winner on-chain.
